message:
✨ OSC 52 clipboard support with copy toast notification (#135)

- Configure tmux set-clipboard on and allow-passthrough on globally and per-session
- Parse OSC 52 escape sequences from tmux in WebSocket onmessage handler
- Write decoded clipboard text via navigator.clipboard.writeText()
- Show subtle 'Copied: ...' toast at bottom center on successful copy
- Store last copied text as fallback for clipboard API failures

When users double-click to select text in tmux, the selection is now
automatically copied to the browser clipboard via tmux's OSC 52
protocol, with visual feedback via a small toast notification.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
